summary.title: Launch Claude C3 filter policy session
summary.what: Registered the C3 filtering/linearization worker session after integrating C1 and C2. The registry now records the actual C3 thread id and worktree, and workflow-state marks C3 active.
summary.why: C3 is the next dependency before C4 can define an implementation slice. The orchestrator must preserve the actual worker thread and worktree in the canonical control plane.

decisions.rationale: C3 needs both the refreshed Claude evidence and the ingestion-route decision.

decisions.chose: Record the actual C3 thread id and worker worktree immediately after resolution.
decisions.rationale: This avoids stale pending ids and makes the handoff lookup deterministic.
